data.content: Implemented conversation selection for the history debugger in AgentHistoryView so the debug pane targets the user-selected session instead of always binding to the first session. Added a conversation selector above the log view, preserved selection across debug panel toggles, and expanded the debug integration test to cover multi-session selection. Sanity gates passed in /Users/cartine/foolery-wt-foolery-70ec: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Branch: work/foolery-70ec. Commit: 294904cd55af.
